author: Christopher Lee McClendon
name: 11L GEPA + 25k Steps + Pure Int6 + 15-Percentile GPTQ-lite + Legal TTT
blurb: GEPA architecture trained for 25000 steps (12000 peak-LR + 13000 warmdown) with pure int6 per-row quantization and 15-candidate GPTQ-lite clip search. Legal score-first TTT (SGD, 10 epochs, momentum 0.9). Extended warmdown produced a remarkable float base of 1.1088 and smallest artifact yet at 13.75 MB.
